subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer – Fintech
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

SwiftLedger (fintech) is looking for a senior Microservices Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2023-01-16
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: Malmö (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• AWS

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
